name: Dhaka
description: Capital city of Bangladesh, known for its vibrant culture and heritage.

name: Chattogram
description: A major coastal city and financial hub of Bangladesh.

name: Khulna
description: Located near the Sundarbans, famous for its rivers and mangroves.

name: Rajshahi
description: Known as the Silk City and Education City of Bangladesh.

name: Sylhet
description: Famous for tea gardens, rolling hills, and natural beauty.

name: Barishal
description: Known as the Venice of the East, rich in rivers and canals.

name: Rangpur
description: A division with rich agriculture and historical landmarks.

name: Mymensingh
description: Home to Bangladesh Agricultural University and lush countryside.

name: Comilla
description: Rich in history and cultural heritage.

name: Cox's Bazar
description: Famous for having the world’s longest natural sea beach.
